content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-visible toggle subtitle says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:13), which may trigger review questions about shipping unfinished features.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects apps that present themselves as betas or demos, and reviewers do read in-app strings, especially for features highlighted in release notes ("New AI Sort option", fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1). The Settings UI explicitly labels AI Sort as experimental and unstable, which suggests a work-in-progress feature. Consider rewording to neutral copy (e.g., "AI Sort automatically organizes your inbox") or removing the instability disclaimer before submission.
